math_recheck: Re-derived the full chain against Nolting cond-mat/0106031 (Bogoliubov inequality proof Eqs 2.9-2.19, operator choice C=S+(k)/A=S-(-k-K) Eq 3.13, anticommutator sum rule Eq 3.36 = 2hbar^2 S(S+1) N^2, double-commutator bound Eq 3.53 with 1-cos<=k^2 R^2/4, integration Eqs 3.74-3.77) and Hofmann arXiv 1711.10003 (integral inequality 4.1, d=1 Eq 4.3, d=2 Eq 4.4, bounds 4.5, constants 4.6 c1=S(S+1)Jbar^1/3, c2=sqrt(2pi)S(S+1)Jbar^1/2, short-range Jbar def 4.7, d=3 control 4.8); ran the numerical illustration (confirmed d=1 ~1/sqrt(bm), d=2 increment=(1/2)ln100=2.30/decade^2 logarithmic, d=3 saturates to 1/J). All signs, factors, the K-independence, and the d<=2 vs d=3 power-counting verified correct.
fixes: reasoning.md:147-153 d=1 algebra dropped the S(S+1) factor under the root (collapsed 1/sqrt(bmJ) to 1/sqrt(bm)); rewrote keeping J=S(S+1)Jbar explicit so c1=S(S+1)Jbar^1/3 tracks to first power of S(S+1)

reasoning.md:157-163 d=2 algebra had m^2 < const*S(S+1)/... (first power) inconsistent with c2 proportional to S(S+1); rewrote keeping the 1/2J=1/(2 S(S+1)Jbar) prefactor explicit so m^2 < const*(S(S+1))^2 Jbar/... gives c2=sqrt(2pi)S(S+1)Jbar^1/2

reasoning.md:141 Sigma_k -> V_d/(2pi)^d int was missing the factor N (V_d called per-spin volume), so it did not produce the N-cancellation in the next line; corrected to N V_d/(2pi)^d with the N-cancellation noted
reasoning.md:173 changed c1 proportional/c2 proportional to c1=/c2= to match the exact source constants and answer.md
answer.md:75 same missing-N fix in the Sigma_k -> integral substitution
